complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the Kubernetes microservices architecture setup into detailed implementation steps, including infrastructure provisioning, cluster configuration, security implementation, CI/CD pipeline setup, and monitoring system deployment. For each subtask, specify the tools, configurations, and validation criteria.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves complex cloud infrastructure setup across multiple regions with high availability requirements, security implementations, and multiple integrated systems (Terraform, Istio, Vault, ArgoCD). It requires specialized DevOps expertise and careful planning for disaster recovery and security.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the GraphQL API orchestration layer implementation into detailed subtasks covering schema design, resolver implementation, authentication/authorization, performance optimization, documentation, and testing. For each subtask, specify the technical approach, acceptance criteria, and integration points with other system components.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task requires designing and implementing a complex GraphQL schema with resolvers, data loaders, authentication, and performance optimizations. It's a critical component that interfaces with multiple microservices and requires careful design for performance and security.

complexityAnalysis.taskTitle: Implement FHIR Gateway for Healthcare Interoperability
complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the FHIR gateway implementation into detailed subtasks covering FHIR resource modeling, adapter development for different healthcare systems, transformation services, authentication mechanisms, audit logging, and bulk data operations. For each subtask, specify the technical approach, healthcare standards compliance requirements, and testing strategy.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves implementing complex healthcare interoperability standards (FHIR R4) with multiple adapters for different systems. It requires deep domain knowledge of healthcare data standards, security requirements for health data, and integration with various external systems.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the multimodal AI consultation engine development into detailed subtasks covering Spanish LLM fine-tuning, vision model integration, tabular data model development, ensemble architecture, confidence scoring, explainability mechanisms, and clinical validation. For each subtask, specify the AI techniques, data requirements, performance metrics, and integration approach.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This is the most complex task, involving cutting-edge AI technologies across multiple modalities (text, vision, tabular data) with healthcare-specific fine-tuning. It requires specialized ML expertise, large datasets, complex model ensembling, and rigorous clinical validation to achieve the target diagnostic concordance.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the security and compliance framework implementation into detailed subtasks covering consent management, audit logging, access control, data classification, encryption, privacy controls, and security monitoring. For each subtask, specify the technical approach, compliance requirements (COFEPRIS, ISO 27001, INAI), and validation criteria.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves implementing sophisticated security mechanisms (OpenID Connect, UMA 2.0, Hyperledger Fabric) while ensuring compliance with multiple regulatory frameworks. It requires specialized security expertise and careful design to protect sensitive health data.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the multichannel conversation interface development into detailed subtasks covering core conversation engine, WhatsApp integration, USSD interface, voice components, language support, context-sensitive UI adapters, and accessibility features. For each subtask, specify the technical approach, channel-specific requirements, and testing strategy.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task requires implementing interfaces across multiple communication channels (text, voice, WhatsApp, USSD) with support for multiple languages including indigenous languages. It involves complex state management and integration with external communication APIs.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the e-prescription and payment system implementation into detailed subtasks covering prescription data modeling, digital signature implementation, pharmacy integration, payment processing, prescription validation, tracking system, and regulatory compliance. For each subtask, specify the technical approach, integration requirements, and validation criteria.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves implementing a regulated e-prescription system with digital signatures, integration with multiple pharmacy chains, and payment processing. It requires compliance with Mexican healthcare regulations and secure handling of prescription data.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the chronic disease management modules development into detailed subtasks covering disease-specific data models, wearable device integration, care plan generation, trend analysis, medication adherence tracking, educational content delivery, and progress visualization. For each subtask, specify the clinical requirements, technical approach, and validation criteria.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task requires implementing specialized modules for multiple chronic conditions with integration of various wearable devices. It involves complex clinical workflows, trend analysis algorithms, and personalized care plan generation based on medical best practices.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the teleconsultation system implementation into detailed subtasks covering provider directory, scheduling system, video consultation platform, medical history sharing, consultation documentation, follow-up scheduling, and provider rating system. For each subtask, specify the technical approach, user experience requirements, and testing strategy.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves implementing a complete teleconsultation platform with scheduling, secure video, medical documentation, and follow-up capabilities. It requires integration with provider systems and careful design for medical data sharing during consultations.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the smart emergency services implementation into detailed subtasks covering emergency detection algorithms, geolocation services, emergency service integration, contact notification, medical information sharing, and post-emergency protocols. For each subtask, specify the technical approach, emergency response requirements, and validation criteria.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves critical emergency detection and response capabilities with integration to official emergency services. It requires sophisticated algorithms for detecting emergencies from various inputs, precise geolocation, and reliable communication with emergency services.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the clinical performance metrics dashboard implementation into detailed subtasks covering KPI definition, data collection pipeline, statistical analysis models, visualization components, role-based access, and reporting functionality. For each subtask, specify the metrics requirements, technical approach, and validation criteria.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task requires implementing sophisticated analytics for clinical performance with statistical models for diagnostic concordance and visualization of complex healthcare metrics. It involves data aggregation from multiple sources and role-specific views for different stakeholders.

complexityAnalysis.expansionPrompt: Break down the subscription and payment models implementation into detailed subtasks covering subscription plan structures, recurring billing, commission tracking, B2B licensing, B2G program management, revenue analytics, and promotion management. For each subtask, specify the business requirements, technical approach, and validation criteria.
complexityAnalysis.reasoning: This task involves implementing complex business models across B2C, B2B, and B2G segments with multiple revenue streams. It requires integration with payment processors, commission calculations, and sophisticated subscription management across different user segments.
